channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Services Seta launches project management unit to improve programme delivery and oversight
item.description: The Services Seta has announced a significant organisational overhaul with the launch of a new Project Management Unit (PMU), aiming to address persistent challenges in skills development programme de...

item.title: COAS Asim Munir holds talks at Iran's military HQ amid peace efforts
item.description: Chief of Army Staff and Chief of Defence Forces, Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir, visited the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters of the Iranian armed forces in Tehran. This visit is part of Pakistan’...

item.title: Tunu Halisi to compose AFCON 2027 song after winning BASATA Rising Star Award
item.description: DAR ES SALAAM – The National Arts Council of Tanzania (BASATA) has officially named Tunu Halisi as the winner of the BASATA Rising Star Awards. In recognition of his achievement, Tunu Halisi has been ...

item.title: Ogun State Upskills Workforce with Digital Training Initiative
item.description: The Ogun State government in Nigeria has announced a program to equip 200 personnel with vital digital skills. This initiative, driven by the State's commitment to technological advancement and workfo...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon Agree on Temporary Ceasefire After US-Brokered Talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a ten-day ceasefire, bringing a temporary pause to the conflict that erupted in Lebanon on March 2 following Hezbollah's atta...

item.title: Maharashtra Legislative Council Elections: Dates Announced for Nine Seats & Bypoll
item.description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) has announced the dates for elections to nine seats of the Maharashtra Legislative Council, along with a bypoll to one seat. Voting will take place on May 12th. ...

item.title: US Former Lieutenant Governor Kills Wife Amid Divorce Dispute
item.description: In a shocking incident from Virginia, former US Lieutenant Governor Justin Fairfax has killed his wife, Cerina Fairfax, amidst ongoing divorce proceedings. The tragic event unfolded on Thursday, April...

item.title: LaMelo Ball accidentally hits Hornets mascot during postgame celebration after play-in win
item.description: During the Charlotte Hornets' 127-126 play-in tournament victory over the Miami Heat, point guard LaMelo Ball accidentally struck the team's mascot, Hugo, twice during the postgame celebration. The ga...

item.title: City Power warns of potential service suspension due to attacks on staff
item.description: City Power has issued a warning that ongoing attacks on its technicians could lead to service suspensions in high-risk areas across Johannesburg. Two weeks ago in Alexandra, five armed suspects hijack...

item.title: Spanish honeymooner severely injured in Maldives shark attack near fish processing plant
item.description: A 31-year-old Spanish doctor, Borja from Alicante, was critically injured during a honeymoon trip to the Maldives when he was attacked by a shark near a fish processing facility off Kooddoo island. Th...

item.title: Commission Urges Employers to Uphold Rights of Domestic Workers
item.description: Mambo! The Commission for Mediation and Arbitration (CMA) imetoa rai muhimu kwa wadau wa ajira ya wafanyakazi wa nyumbani. Basically, they're telling employers kumtii sheria na taratibu za kazi. Mr. U...

item.title: Atiku Abubakar may seek presidency again in 2031, political allies suggest
item.description: The Vanguard article reports that former Vice President Atiku Abubakar is being projected to recontest for the presidency of Nigeria in 2031, after several failed attempts in previous elections. The p...

item.title: World Athletics blocks Kenyan athletes’ bid to switch nationality and represent Türkiye
item.description: World Athletics has rejected applications by top Kenyan athletes who wanted to change their nationality and represent Türkiye in international competitions. The continental body said the moves were pa...

item.title: Lena Dunham Reflects on Her Memoir 'Famesick' and Challenges Filming 'Girls'
item.description: Lena Dunham's latest memoir, 'Famesick,' explores her personal struggles with chronic illness, her past relationships with Jack Antonoff and Adam Driver, and the challenges she faced during her career...

item.title: Trump announces 10-day ceasefire deal between Israel and Lebanon amid wider conflict with Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that Israel and Lebanon will enter a 10-day ceasefire within hours, describing it as a potential step toward ending the broader conflict involving Iran. The tru...

item.title: Jigawa State Uses Cross-Border Water Initiatives to Reduce Farmer-Herder Conflicts
item.description: Jigawa State don find one unique way to reduce the constant wahala between farmers and herders wey dey happen because of livestock migration from Niger Republic. Governor Umar Namadi don introduce wat...

item.title: FCT Court Issues Arrest Warrant Against Former Minister Sadiya Faruoq Over Alleged Misappropriation
item.description: Abuja, Nigeria – The Federal Capital Territory High Court don issue arrest warrant for former Minister of Humanitarian Affairs, Disaster Management and Social Development, Sadiya Umar Faruoq, together...

item.title: Suspended EMPD Deputy Chief Testifies on Alleged Cash Offer and MoU with Cat-Linked Company
item.description: Suspended Ekurhuleni Metro Police Department (EMPD) deputy chief Julius Mkhwanazi appeared before the Madlanga Commission of Inquiry to address allegations regarding a controversial cash offer and una...

item.title: DSWD Distributes Over P3.2 Billion in Cash Aid to Public Utility Vehicle Drivers Across the Philippines
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has distributed more than P3.2 billion in financial assistance to public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers nationwide. This move aims to help driver...

item.title: Widespread Flooding Prompts State of Emergency on Manitoulin Island and Alerts Across Northeastern Ontario
item.description: Manitoulin Island and parts of northeastern Ontario are experiencing significant flooding due to a combination of snowmelt and heavy rainfall. Several municipalities on Manitoulin Island, including As...
